MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Cullen that notice of the Declaration/Amendment filed on February 24, 2010 and that notice to the Franchise Tax Board was needed. The matter was continued to July 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
